prompt: Three circular badge medallions arranged left-to-right on a neutral matte surface, each progressively more refined: the first in deep restrained green (#3a9e62), the second in cool blue-grey (#7a9ab8), the third in warm ochre (#c8920a). Photorealistic, 35mm prime, shallow depth of field, soft directional north light. The badges sit on brushed metal. No text on the badges, no faces, no logos, no leaves, no recycling symbols. Editorial, calm, considered. --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 7
surface: /about and /methodology pages, plus social explainer card
notes: Append --oref <anchor-url> --ow 400 when running. Replace oref_image above with the anchor URL used.
